novel.title: 洪荒之我在鸿钧手下当差
novel.author: 云中子
novel.description: 凡人意外拜入鸿钧门下，成为天定棋子，在巫妖量劫中走出不一样的成圣之路

coverPrompt:
Ancient Chinese Taoist temple floating above clouds, a young mortal man in simple robes standing before an ancient jade throne, vast cosmic nebula background, golden divine light streaming down, mystical fog, ethereal atmosphere, cinematic, high quality, novel cover style
text overlay: "我在鸿钧手下当差", 3:4 ratio
xhsCoverCopy: 道祖收徒，我却笑不出来
